rationale: Both candidates independently found the same latent gap (the unswept HunyuanImage3 diffusion-transformer caller of get_cache_scale), which the ground-truth human reviewers missed — a strong catch for both. X grounds its finding in a PR-time-tree grep and frames it as an actionable blocker with concrete line-level fixes (add to _STALE_API_FILES, apply mapper pattern), plus an additional well-grounded catch (the mimo_audio mapper-ordering fix pre-empting a double-prefix bug). Y does deeper upstream design verification and its test-coverage critique (Note 1) echoes the human's fake-param-vs-real-checkpoint concern, but it downgrades the diffusion-transformer gap to a resolved historical note (an unverifiable claim about current main) rather than a blocking action, softening its practical value. Neither fully covers the human review's #4808/5-call-site coordination point or explicitly praises the regression test as the reviewer did.
